description_long: This is a modern, rectangular washing machine with a front-loading circular door that features a faceted, geometric frame. The front panel includes a rotary dial, a digital display, and a horizontal slot likely for detergent, all set above the door. The sides of the machine are plain with vertical indented lines for structural reinforcement, while the back is featureless. The exterior is predominantly a smooth, light-colored material, likely painted or powder-coated metal. The door is made of a combination of plastic and glass, with a dark-tinted window allowing partial visibility into the drum. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for residential or utility spaces.
description: A modern, front-loading washing machine with a faceted circular door, digital controls, and a smooth, light-colored exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular door, control panel with dial and display, and detergent slot above the door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying vertical indented lines and the protruding door frame.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, featureless surface and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with vertical indented lines and the door frame visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a central rotary dial, a digital display on the right, and a horizontal slot (likely for detergent) on the left. The panel is simple, with minimal visible buttons or labels.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular porthole door with a faceted plastic frame and a dark-tinted glass window. No visible handle, but a latch mechanism is implied by the design.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible as a horizontal slot on the upper left of the front panel, directly above the door.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially visible; the drum can be seen through the dark-tinted glass window in the door.
